deniedGlobals.window: Pure core: no browser global (lives in a web adapter).
deniedGlobals.document: Pure core: no browser global (lives in a web adapter).
deniedGlobals.navigator: Pure core: no browser global (lives in a web adapter).
deniedGlobals.localStorage: Pure core: no browser global (lives in a web adapter).
deniedGlobals.fetch: Pure core: no network I/O (lives in an adapter).
deniedGlobals.XMLHttpRequest: Pure core: no network I/O (lives in an adapter).
deniedGlobals.WebSocket: Pure core: no network I/O (lives in an adapter).
deniedGlobals.process: Pure core: no access to the Node environment.
deniedGlobals.Date: Pure core: no ambient time. Inject a clock port and pass the instant.
deniedGlobals.performance: Pure core: no ambient time. Inject a clock port.
deniedGlobals.setTimeout: Pure core: no scheduling. Time is a port, not a global.
deniedGlobals.setInterval: Pure core: no scheduling. Time is a port, not a global.
deniedGlobals.setImmediate: Pure core: no scheduling. Time is a port, not a global.
deniedGlobals.queueMicrotask: Pure core: no scheduling. Time is a port, not a global.
deniedGlobals.crypto: Pure core: no ambient randomness. Inject a port that yields the value.

paths.node:fs: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:fs/promises: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:http: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:https: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:net: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:dns: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:tls: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:dgram: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:readline: Pure core: I/O lives in an adapter.
paths.node:process: Pure core: no access to the Node environment.
paths.node:timers: Pure core: no scheduling. Time is a port, not a global.
paths.node:timers/promises: Pure core: no scheduling. Time is a port, not a global.
paths.node:perf_hooks: Pure core: no ambient time. Inject a clock port.
